title: Vibrant Biomes
description: A Resource Pack that makes the grass (e.g. grass blocks), foliage (e.g. fern) and dry foliage (e.g leaf litter) more vibrant and less washed out without being too extreme of a difference from Vanilla, Inspired by the aesthetics of Minecraft Alpha/Beta!
body:
## Vibrant Biomes (Resource Pack)
A resource pack created to make biomes (specifically grass, foliage and dry foliage) more vibrant and appealing without being overpowering in contrast/saturation!

Aimed to make the game feel less washed in color pallete and inspired by the colors of Alpha/Beta; Greatly complements **Programmer Art (Built-in)** and [**Programmer Art Fix (by THGABS)**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/programmer-art-fix) as well as the standard 1.14+ style!

*All gallery pictures of the resource pack both active and inactive are taken with the [**Ideal Vanilla**](https://modrinth.com/modpack/ideal-vanilla) (v1.3.2) modpack.*
